verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast?
verse.verse_2: And We removed from you your burden
verse.verse_3: Which had weighed upon your back
verse.verse_4: And raised high for you your repute.
verse.verse_5: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
verse.verse_7: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].
verse.verse_8: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
